executiveSnapshot: The Lapu-Lapu operating picture shows 8 P1 workstream(s) and 2 watch item(s). 10 workstream(s) show increasing activity in the last 14 days. Top attention today is on MMM L2.

primaryFocus.name: MMM L2
primaryFocus.overrideReason: Monitoring maturity remains a core Lapu-Lapu objective and dependency for Rapid Recovery, GOCC and GBO readiness.
